title: roridulaceae
intro: The Roridulaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a small, ancient family of flowering plants, commonly known as roridulous or moonstones, characterized by their unique, leafless, and parasitic nature. This family is native to Australia and has only a few species, which are often found in humid, shaded environments. Roridulaceae is one of the most primitive flowering plant families, providing valuable insights into the evolution of plant life.
